name: Fallen Relics
short_description: "Fallen Relics" is an ARPG-type adventure-themed game. You and your friends can use characters of different professions to explore, fight, collect, and decrypt in various themed levels; you can develop your character in a variety of ways and then challenge powerful bosses.
detailed_description:
If you have any questions during the game, you can report them in [Menu->Help->Problem Feedback]. Thank you very much for playing!

Combat mechanism

Each profession has different attack methods and auxiliary attack methods; choose 3 active skills from multiple skills to deal with different enemies; and prepare food and potions before the battle to enhance your strength in the battle. You and your teammates' skills will have a more powerful effect when they match each other.

Dungeon Exploration

Collect supplies in the ruins, defeat enemies to obtain loot, find hidden rewards in puzzles, and defeat powerful bosses at the end of the level to obtain legendary resources and equipment.

Character development

There are a variety of professions to choose from, a variety of equipment options, and a variety of skill combinations. Choose the talents that suit you and develop your own unique character.

Cartoon style

Fresh and clean graphics, various styles of cartoon-themed ecological environments.

Multiplayer play

You can adventure in the world with 2 friends!

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*, Traditional Chinese*, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
